---
title: About
---

Hi, I'm Cathal. This is my personal website. I may curse and will spell many things incorrectly

The site is built with [litedown](https://github.com/yihui/litedown) — Yihui Xie's
lightweight take on R Markdown.

Tables use [lt](https://github.com/yihui/lt) and interactive charts use
[gglite](https://github.com/yihui/gglite), both by the same author.

You can reach me at [cathal470@gmail.com](mailto:cathal470@gmail.com).
